title: asplenium cicutarium var. monteverdense
intro: Asplenium cicutarium var. monteverdense, also known as the lady fern, is a species of fern in the family Aspleniaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Asplenium cicutarium var. monteverdense can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and powdering the leaves for use in capsules or tinctures.
